blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,161 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
